SEARCH
Package org.apache.pulsar.client.api.v5.schema

Interface GenericRecord

public interface GenericRecord
A schema-less view over a decoded message value, used when the value's schema is discovered at runtime rather than known at compile time (see Schema.autoConsume()).

The shape of the value depends on schemaType():

  • SchemaType.AVRO, SchemaType.JSON, SchemaType.PROTOBUF_NATIVE: a structured record — use fields() and field(String) to read its fields. A field value may itself be a GenericRecord (nested record).
  • SchemaType.KEY_VALUE: fields() is empty and nativeObject() is a KeyValue.
  • any primitive type (e.g. SchemaType.STRING, SchemaType.INT32): fields() is empty and nativeObject() is the primitive value.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Object
    field(String fieldName)
    Get the value of a field by name.
    default Object
    field(Field field)
    Get the value of a field.
    List<Field>
    fields()
    The fields of this record, in declaration order.
    Object
    nativeObject()
    The underlying decoded value: a KeyValue for SchemaType.KEY_VALUE, a primitive for a primitive schema, or an implementation-specific native record for structured types.
    SchemaType
    schemaType()
    The schema type of the decoded value.

  • Method Details

    • schemaType

      SchemaType schemaType()
      The schema type of the decoded value.
      Returns:
      the SchemaType

    • nativeObject

      Object nativeObject()
      The underlying decoded value: a KeyValue for SchemaType.KEY_VALUE, a primitive for a primitive schema, or an implementation-specific native record for structured types.
      Returns:
      the native object, or null

    • fields

      List<Field> fields()
      The fields of this record, in declaration order. Empty for non-record (primitive or key/value) values.
      Returns:
      the list of Fields

    • field

      Object field(String fieldName)
      Get the value of a field by name.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name
      Returns:
      the field value, or null if absent

    • field

      default Object field(Field field)
      Get the value of a field.
      Parameters:
      field - the field
      Returns:
      the field value, or null if absent
